queries.description: Implementing an entity in multiple source locations increases the risk of ODR violations and undefined behavior.
queries.name: The source code used to implement an entity shall appear only once

implementation_scope.description: This query does not detect duplicated definitions of inline variables.

queries.description: Template specializations must be defined in the same file as the primary template or where a specialized type is defined to ensure visibility and avoid ODR violations.
queries.name: Template specializations in wrong location

queries.description: Defining a type with the same fully qualified name in multiple files increases the risk of ODR violations and undefined behavior.
queries.name: Duplicate type definitions across files

RULE-6-2-3.title: The source code used to implement an entity shall appear only once
